# Structural syntax (generated)

Generated from `src/frontend/structural/ast.rs` and `src/frontend/structural/parser.rs`. See [README.md](README.md).

## Notation

- `X` — exactly one value in the section.
- `X+` — one or more values in the section.
- `X*` — zero or more values in the section.
- `section?:` — the section itself may be omitted; sections appear in the order shown.
- A leading `[..]` line is the group's heading; `[..]?` means the heading is optional.
- A section shown with no type takes no value (for example a head section whose name lives in `Documented:` `called:`).

## Top-level items

The 18 groups accepted at the top level of a file.

| Head | Group | Heading |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Axiom:` | `AxiomGroup` | `[CommandHeader]?` |
| `Corollary:` | `CorollaryGroup` | `[CommandHeader]?` |
| `Defines:` | `DefinesGroup` | `[CommandHeader]` |
| `Describes:` | `DescribesGroup` | `[CommandHeader]` |
| `Equivalent:` | `EquivalentGroup` | `[CommandHeader]` |
| `Person:` | `PersonGroup` | `[AuthorHeader]` |
| `Refines:` | `RefinesGroup` | `[CommandHeader]` |
| `Relation:` | `RelationGroup` | none |
| `Resource:` | `ResourceGroup` | `[ResourceHeader]` |
| `SectionTitle:` | `SectionTitleGroup` | none |
| `Specify:` | `SpecifyGroup` | none |
| `States:` | `StatesGroup` | `[CommandHeader]` |
| `SubsectionTitle:` | `SubsectionTitleGroup` | none |
| `Text:` | `TextGroup` | none |
| `Theorem:` | `TheoremGroup` | `[CommandHeader]?` |
| `Title:` | `TitleGroup` | none |
| `Topic:` | `TopicGroup` | `[TopicHeader]` |
| `Writing:` | `TopLevelWritingGroup` | none |

### `Axiom:`

Builds `AxiomGroup`.

```group
[CommandHeader]?
Axiom:
given?: <DeclarationStatement>+
where?: <Clause>+
then: <Clause>+
iff?: <Clause>+
Justified?: <JustifiedItem>+
Documented?: <DocumentedItem>+
Aliases?: <AliasItem>+
References?: <ResourceHeader>+
Metadata?: <MetadataItem>+
Id?:
```

then: <Clause>+
iff?: <Clause>+
Justified?: <JustifiedItem>+
Documented?: <DocumentedItem>+

## Groups this tool cannot derive

These groups are parsed by bespoke logic rather than the `identify_sections(head, .., &[..])` pattern every other group follows, so their shape cannot be read out of the code. They are listed here instead of being guessed at. Consult the parser directly, or refactor them onto the common pattern to have them documented automatically.

- `DisambiguatesGroup` — parsed by `parse_disambiguates`

## Unions

Enums in the structural AST. Each alternative is the type it holds.

```union
AliasItem ::=
    | AliasGroup
```

```union
AliasKind ::=
    | ExpressionAlias
    | SpecOperatorAlias
```

```union
BindingOrSpec ::=
    | DeclarationStatement
```

```union
Clause ::=
    | NotGroup
    | AllOfGroup
    | AnyOfGroup
    | OneOfGroup
    | ExistsGroup
    | ExistsUniqueGroup
    | ForAllGroup
    | IfGroup
    | IffGroup
    | EquivalentlyGroup
    | PiecewiseGroup
    | GivenGroup
    | DeclarationStatement
    | Expression
```

```union
DescribesTarget ::=
    | FormOrDeclaration
    | DeclarationStatement
```

```union
DocumentedItem ::=
    | WrittenGroup
    | CalledGroup
    | AdjectiveGroup
    | WritingGroup
    | OverviewGroup
    | DescriptionGroup
    | RelatedGroup
    | DiscovererGroup
```

```union
EnablesItem ::=
    | CapabilityGroup
    | FromCapabilityGroup
    | FromAsGroup
    | EnablesRelationGroup
```

```union
IsOrViaItem ::=
    | IsViaStatement
    | DeclarationStatement
```

```union
JustifiedItem ::=
    | LabelGroup
    | ByGroup
```

```union
MetadataItem ::=
    | IdGroup
    | VersionGroup
```

```union
RelationKind ::=
    | Coercion
    | Encoding
```

```union
RelationMeans ::=
    | Clause
    | OpenText
```

```union
RelationSubject ::=
    | DeclarationStatement
    | OpenText
```

```union
RelationWhenItem ::=
    | DeclarationStatement
    | HardCastStatement
```

```union
RelationshipDeclaration ::=
    | CommandExpression
    | DeclarationStatement
```

```union
RequiresItem ::=
    | CapabilityGroup
    | DefinitionGroup
```

```union
ResourceItem ::=
    | ResourceTitleGroup
    | ResourceAuthorGroup
    | ResourceOffsetGroup
    | ResourceUrlGroup
    | ResourceHomepageGroup
    | ResourceTypeGroup
    | ResourceEditionGroup
    | ResourceEditorGroup
    | ResourceInstitutionGroup
    | ResourceJournalGroup
    | ResourcePublisherGroup
    | ResourceVolumeGroup
    | ResourceMonthGroup
    | ResourceYearGroup
    | ResourceDescriptionGroup
```

```union
SpecifyItem ::=
    | PositiveIntGroup
    | NegativeIntGroup
    | ZeroGroup
    | PositiveDecimalGroup
    | NegativeDecimalGroup
```

```union
TopLevelItem ::=
    | TitleGroup
    | SectionTitleGroup
    | SubsectionTitleGroup
    | TextGroup
    | TopLevelWritingGroup
    | DisambiguatesGroup
    | DescribesGroup
    | DefinesGroup
    | RefinesGroup
    | StatesGroup
    | AxiomGroup
    | TheoremGroup
    | CorollaryGroup
    | PersonGroup
    | ResourceGroup
    | SpecifyGroup
    | RelationGroup
    | EquivalentGroup
    | TopicGroup
```
